seoTitle: Masig Island vs Maudsland — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Masig Island and Maudsland. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Masig Island vs Maudsland: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Masig Island and Maudsland.
heading: Masig Island vs Maudsland — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Masig Island, Queensland and Maudsland, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Masig Island has a lower overall climate risk score (25/100) compared to Maudsland (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Masig Island or Maudsland safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Masig Island has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Maudsland scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Masig Island scores 15/100 for bushfire risk. Maudsland scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Masig Island or Maudsland?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Masig Island has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
